{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Loan Recovery Officer",
  "description": "B-Freedom Outsourcing - We are a professional collection service provider dedicated to assisting loan institutions in swift and effection recovery of their bad-debt. We make calls to customers to pay their outstanding debts, Send messages to customers, Guide customers through the payment process, Persuade reluctant customers to make payment promptly, Meet weekly and monthly targets, Give proper and correct report of work.

We used use skilled and experienced recovery agents to support loan agencies, using multiple communication channels such as SMS, phone calls and emails to remnf and encourage customers to fulfil their repayment.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Loan Recovery Officer

Job Location: Ijaye, Abule Egba - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Details


	Contact customers to follow up on outstanding loan repayments.
	Negotiate and agree on feasible repayment plans.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an SSCE, FSLC, OND, NCE, HND, or Bachelor&#39;s Degree.
	Must have an Android phone to work with.
	Must be ready to work on-site.
	Training is done for newly recruited candidates.


Job Perks


	Salary: N60,000 - N150,000 / Month.
	Vibrant workspace alongside coperative team members
	Daily bonus of up to #19,000 based on target met
	5 Working days in a week.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send CV to bfreedomoutsourcing@gmail.com using &quot;Loan Recovery Officer&quot; as the subject of the email.

Note: For more information Whatsapp: 07040351811.",

Loan Recovery Officer Job at B-Freedom Outsourcing




        
    

        
        B-Freedom Outsourcing - We are a professional collection service provider dedicated to assisting loan institutions in swift and effection recovery of their bad-debt. We make calls to customers to pay their outstanding debts, Send messages to customers, Guide customers through the payment process, Persuade reluctant customers to make payment promptly, Meet weekly and monthly targets, Give proper and correct report of work.

We used use skilled and experienced recovery agents to support loan agencies, using multiple communication channels such as SMS, phone calls and emails to remnf and encourage customers to fulfil their repayment.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Loan Recovery Officer
     

            
    



Job Location: Ijaye, Abule Egba - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Details


	Contact customers to follow up on outstanding loan repayments.
	Negotiate and agree on feasible repayment plans.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an SSCE, FSLC, OND, NCE, HND, or Bachelor's Degree.
	Must have an Android phone to work with.
	Must be ready to work on-site.
	Training is done for newly recruited candidates.


Job Perks


	Salary: N60,000 - N150,000 / Month.
	Vibrant workspace alongside coperative team members
	Daily bonus of up to #19,000 based on target met
	5 Working days in a week.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send CV to [email protected] using "Loan Recovery Officer" as the subject of the email.

Note: For more information Whatsapp: 07040351811.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Communication Manager",
  "description": "UC Agency, a recruiting agency, is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Communication Manager

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;

Responsibilities


	Develop and execute brand communication strategies in line with company guidelines.
	Maintain consistency of tone, style, and messaging across all channels.
	Create content calendars and supervise the content creation process across platforms.
	Partner with design and marketing teams to deliver impactful campaigns.
	Build and nurture relationships with media, influencers, and key stakeholders.
	Manage press coverage, interviews, and handle crisis communication effectively.
	Support leadership with clear internal communication and employee engagement initiatives.
	Monitor communication performance using KPIs and provide actionable insights.
	Report regularly on brand visibility and recommend improvements.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their application to: ucjobagency@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Business Communication Manager Job at UC Agency




        
    

        
        UC Agency, a recruiting agency, is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Communication Manager

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 

Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Develop and execute brand communication strategies in line with company guidelines.
	Maintain consistency of tone, style, and messaging across all channels.
	Create content calendars and supervise the content creation process across platforms.
	Partner with design and marketing teams to deliver impactful campaigns.
	Build and nurture relationships with media, influencers, and key stakeholders.
	Manage press coverage, interviews, and handle crisis communication effectively.
	Support leadership with clear internal communication and employee engagement initiatives.
	Monitor communication performance using KPIs and provide actionable insights.
	Report regularly on brand visibility and recommend improvements.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their application to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Admin Manager",
  "description": "UnoCasa is a full service Human Resources Consultancy business with focus on Talent Acquisition, Learning &amp; Development and Consultancy services. Our raison d&rsquo;etre is the notion that your people are your advantage and proffer people-centric solutions to ensure your team accomplish your business goals.

We are not your run of the mill HR Company, we believe in team diversity and teamwork; we believe that the workplace should have an ambience that inspires productivity of the team; and the application of technologies to enhance efficiency. We know that every business is unique and tailor HR solutions to your organisation&rsquo;s needs. Our clients are in various sectors not limited to engineering, education, health oil &amp; gas, government, media, finance, retail, lifestyle, consultancy firms and services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Admin Manager

Job Location: Warri, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Head, Organizational Development

Job Summary


	Are you a strategic and results-driven administrative professional with a strong background in facilities, fleet, and vendor management?
	We are seeking an experienced Admin Manager to lead and optimize our administrative operations, ensuring efficient support for business and project activities within a dynamic, project-driven environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee the day-to-day administration, maintenance, security, and functionality of office facilities.
	Ensure compliance with Health, Safety, and Environmental (HSE) standards across all administrative operations.
	Manage office space planning, renovations, infrastructure improvements, and office resources.
	Lead fleet operations, including vehicle acquisition, maintenance, fueling, tracking, and regulatory compliance.
	Provide effective logistics support for business operations and project sites.
	Manage vendor selection, contract negotiation, service-level agreements (SLAs), and vendor performance.
	Drive cost-saving initiatives through efficient facilities, fleet, and vendor management practices.
	Implement and maintain document management, archiving, digitization, and records retention systems.
	Ensure proper management of corporate and regulatory compliance documentation.
	Oversee office security systems, access controls, and relationships with security service providers.
	Liaise with government and regulatory agencies to ensure compliance with administrative and facility regulations.
	Lead and develop the administration team through training, succession planning, and continuous improvement initiatives.
	Monitor administrative budgets and ensure operational efficiency while maintaining service quality.


Qualification &amp; Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Business Administration, Management, Facilities Management, or a related field.
	8&ndash;10 years of progressive experience in administration, facilities management, fleet management, and vendor management.
	Proven experience within EPC, Oil &amp; Gas, Construction, or other project-based environments.
	Strong track record of managing facilities, logistics, fleets, and vendor contracts.
	Demonstrated success in negotiating service-level agreements (SLAs) and delivering measurable cost savings.
	Knowledge of HSE standards, regulatory compliance, and administrative best practices.
	Proficiency in digital tools for document control, fleet tracking, and vendor management.


Salary

Admin Manager Job at UnoCasa Limited




        
    

        
        UnoCasa is a full service Human Resources Consultancy business with focus on Talent Acquisition, Learning & Development and Consultancy services. Our raison d’etre is the notion that your people are your advantage and proffer people-centric solutions to ensure your team accomplish your business goals.
     

            
    



We are not your run of the mill HR Company, we believe in team diversity and teamwork; we believe that the workplace should have an ambience that inspires productivity of the team; and the application of technologies to enhance efficiency. We know that every business is unique and tailor HR solutions to your organisation’s needs. Our clients are in various sectors not limited to engineering, education, health oil & gas, government, media, finance, retail, lifestyle, consultancy firms and services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Admin Manager

Job Location: Warri, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Head, Organizational Development

Job Summary


	Are you a strategic and results-driven administrative professional with a strong background in facilities, fleet, and vendor management?
	We are seeking an experienced Admin Manager to lead and optimize our administrative operations, ensuring efficient support for business and project activities within a dynamic, project-driven environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee the day-to-day administration, maintenance, security, and functionality of office facilities.
	Ensure compliance with Health, Safety, and Environmental (HSE) standards across all administrative operations.
	Manage office space planning, renovations, infrastructure improvements, and office resources.
	Lead fleet operations, including vehicle acquisition, maintenance, fueling, tracking, and regulatory compliance.
	Provide effective logistics support for business operations and project sites.
	Manage vendor selection, contract negotiation, service-level agreements (SLAs), and vendor performance.
	Drive cost-saving initiatives through efficient facilities, fleet, and vendor management practices.
	Implement and maintain document management, archiving, digitization, and records retention systems.
	Ensure proper management of corporate and regulatory compliance documentation.
	Oversee office security systems, access controls, and relationships with security service providers.
	Liaise with government and regulatory agencies to ensure compliance with administrative and facility regulations.
	Lead and develop the administration team through training, succession planning, and continuous improvement initiatives.
	Monitor administrative budgets and ensure operational efficiency while maintaining service quality.


Qualification & Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Business Administration, Management, Facilities Management, or a related field.
	8–10 years of progressive experience in administration, facilities management, fleet management, and vendor management.
	Proven experience within EPC, Oil & Gas, Construction, or other project-based environments.
	Strong track record of managing facilities, logistics, fleets, and vendor contracts.
	Demonstrated success in negotiating service-level agreements (SLAs) and delivering measurable cost savings.
	Knowledge of HSE standards, regulatory compliance, and administrative best practices.
	Proficiency in digital tools for document control, fleet tracking, and vendor management.


Salary
N1,800,000 - N2,300,000 gross monthly.    

    

        Click here to Apply

About the Role


	Support the Admin / HR function by managing employee lifecycle processes including recruitment, onboarding, employee engagement, records management, performance support, and employee relations.
	Oversee core administrative operations to ensure efficient day-to-day business operations and a positive employee experience while ensuring compliance with policies. labour regulations and organizational standards.


Responsibilities


	Recruitment &amp; onboarding: Coordinate end-to-end recruitment and onboarding of new employees.
	Employee records &amp; documentation: Maintain accurate and confidential employee records and HR documentation.
	Employee relations &amp; engagement: Support engagement initiatives and promote a positive workplace culture.

	Process improvement initiatives: Identify opportunities to improve processes and enhance efficiency.


Why Join Us
Be part of a dynamic team driving excellence in the oil &amp; gas industry.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: hr@jaletan.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "AI Visual Designer / Prompt Engineer",
  "description": "Ooya Media is an AI creative lab producing high-quality commercial and editorial visuals for brands, campaigns, social media and creative concept development.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: AI Visual Designer / Prompt Engineer

Job Location: Remote
Employment Type: Full-time
Working arrangement: Project-based

Job Summary


	We are looking for an experienced AI Visual Designer and Prompt Engineer who can create polished, visually compelling images using generative AI tools.
	This role is not simply about knowing how to write prompts.
	We need someone with a strong understanding of graphic design, visual composition and creative direction.
	You should be able to recognise what makes an image look professional, balanced and commercially usable&mdash;and know how to improve an image when it is not working.


What you will do


	Create high-quality AI visuals from creative briefs and reference images
	Develop and refine prompts to achieve a specific visual direction
	Improve composition, lighting, colour, styling, framing and overall image quality
	Maintain consistency across a series of campaign images
	Edit and refine generated visuals.
	Respond to feedback and produce revisions
	Create visuals suitable for commercial, editorial and social media use


What we are looking for


	Strong experience creating AI-generated images
	A graphic design background or strong practical knowledge of graphic design principles
	Excellent visual judgement and attention to detail
	A strong understanding of composition, typography, colour, lighting and visual hierarchy
	Ability to work from references without simply copying them
	Ability to create images that feel intentional, polished and commercially relevant
	Experience with tools such as Midjourney, ChatGPT image generation, Flux, Stable Diffusion, Leonardo, Adobe Firefly or similar platforms
	Basic image-editing or retouching skills are highly desirable
	Ability to follow a creative brief and accept detailed feedback.


Salary
N200,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their link to their portfolio or examples of their strongest AI visual work, brief explanation of the AI and design tools they use and their availability to begin work to: henrietta@ooyamedia.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.&nbsp;

Note


	This is a project-based, full-time role.
	You will be assigned projects and deadlines, and you will be responsible for completing the agreed work to the required standard.
	We care more about the quality of your work than your qualifications or employment history.
	A long CV is not necessary.
	An ideal portfolio and a strong work example will show your understanding of graphic design, typography, composition and commercial visual quality; this is what we would be looking for.
	Please do not apply without a portfolio.
	Applications will be assessed primarily on the quality of the work submitted.
	Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted and will be given a short, paid test project and invited to a quick interview.

AI Visual Designer / Prompt Engineer Job at Ooya Media




        
    

        
        Ooya Media is an AI creative lab producing high-quality commercial and editorial visuals for brands, campaigns, social media and creative concept development.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: AI Visual Designer / Prompt Engineer

Job Location: Remote
Employment Type: Full-time
Working arrangement: Project-based

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are looking for an experienced AI Visual Designer and Prompt Engineer who can create polished, visually compelling images using generative AI tools.
	This role is not simply about knowing how to write prompts.
	We need someone with a strong understanding of graphic design, visual composition and creative direction.
	You should be able to recognise what makes an image look professional, balanced and commercially usable—and know how to improve an image when it is not working.


What you will do


	Create high-quality AI visuals from creative briefs and reference images
	Develop and refine prompts to achieve a specific visual direction
	Improve composition, lighting, colour, styling, framing and overall image quality
	Maintain consistency across a series of campaign images
	Edit and refine generated visuals.
	Respond to feedback and produce revisions
	Create visuals suitable for commercial, editorial and social media use


What we are looking for


	Strong experience creating AI-generated images
	A graphic design background or strong practical knowledge of graphic design principles
	Excellent visual judgement and attention to detail
	A strong understanding of composition, typography, colour, lighting and visual hierarchy
	Ability to work from references without simply copying them
	Ability to create images that feel intentional, polished and commercially relevant
	Experience with tools such as Midjourney, ChatGPT image generation, Flux, Stable Diffusion, Leonardo, Adobe Firefly or similar platforms
	Basic image-editing or retouching skills are highly desirable
	Ability to follow a creative brief and accept detailed feedback.


Salary
N200,000 per month. 

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their link to their portfolio or examples of their strongest AI visual work, brief explanation of the AI and design tools they use and their availability to begin work to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email. 

Note


	This is a project-based, full-time role.
	You will be assigned projects and deadlines, and you will be responsible for completing the agreed work to the required standard.
	We care more about the quality of your work than your qualifications or employment history.
	A long CV is not necessary.
	An ideal portfolio and a strong work example will show your understanding of graphic design, typography, composition and commercial visual quality; this is what we would be looking for.
	Please do not apply without a portfolio.
	Applications will be assessed primarily on the quality of the work submitted.
	Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted and will be given a short, paid test project and invited to a quick interview.
    

    

        Click here to Apply
